input_schema.description: A collection of cat pictures to rank by unselfconscious charm.

items.description: A picture of a cat to evaluate for the naturalness and authenticity of the captured moment.

input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

input_schema.description: A picture of a cat to evaluate for the authenticity and naturalness of its behavior.

output.$starlark: [score / sum(output) if sum(output) > 0 else 1.0 / len(output) for score in output]

input_schema.description: Cat pictures to rank by emotional resonance — how much genuine feeling each image stirs.

items.description: A picture of a cat to evaluate for the emotional response it creates in the viewer.

input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

input_schema.description: Cat pictures to rank by the spontaneity of their capture — whether each feels seized or manufactured.

items.description: A picture of a cat to evaluate for whether it feels like a candidly captured moment.

input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

description: Ranks cat pictures by unselfconscious charm — the presence of a natural, unposed moment alive with authentic feline behavior. Evaluates three qualities: authenticity of the cat's behavior, emotional resonance stirred in the viewer, and spontaneity of the capture. Images of real cats caught in genuine moments rise to the top.
